description: Snegyu 3 Pack Unisex Baby Hats Cotton Beanies for 0-12 Months Baby Boy Newborn Infant Girls Hospital Hat Baby Hat Size: Head circumference 30-38cm, fits for mostly 0-3 months babies. Head circumference 34-44cm, fits for mostly 3-12 months babies. Kindly note that the recommended age is just for your reference, please choose the size by "head circumference". Thanks! Package Include: baby beanies 3pcs Seasons: Spring / Summer / Autumn / Winter Washing Instructions: Hand Wash Cold. Do Not Bleach. Do Not Dry Clean. Features: Double layer premium stretchy cotton fabric by 95% cotton+5% spandex, soft comfortable and durable. Solid color simple design, can easily match with all kinds of daily wearing. Easy to wear on the little head. Snegyu baby beanie hats with various color combos are your best choice, also your great gift choice for babies. With crimping design, you can easily roll the hat edge up to change the baby hats size. You can roll them up when baby newborn, then unfold some as baby gets older. This baby essential set with no excess stitching, just what you expected, baby will be happy wearing it. Notes: Slightly color deviation is unavoidable due to monitor difference.
